stories.title: Japanese GP Race Result — Antonelli Wins Round 3 at Suzuka
stories.angle: Race recap — Antonelli wins from pole, Piastri P2 (first race of season), Leclerc P3, Russell P4; Bearman crash triggers SC

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
JAPANESE GP RESULT 🏁

P1 Antonelli (Mercedes)
P2 Piastri (McLaren) — first race of 2026
P3 Leclerc (Ferrari)
P4 Russell (Mercedes)

Bearman crash → safety car. Antonelli controlled it from pole to flag.

Two wins in three races. 🔥

#F1Fanrecap #JapaneseGP #F1

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Piastri: P2 at Suzuka in his FIRST race start of 2026. 👀

Missed Australia (formation lap crash) and China (electrical failure).

McLaren had 0 points from Rounds 1-2. Now P3 in constructors'.

Serious statement. 🏎️

#F1Fanrecap #McLaren #JapaneseGP

article.headline: Antonelli Wins Japanese GP: Second Victory in Three Races at Suzuka

stories.title: Antonelli Youngest F1 Championship Leader in History
stories.angle: Historic milestone — 19 years, 6 months, 25 days; youngest ever to lead F1 championship

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
History made at Suzuka. 🏆

Kimi Antonelli — 19 years, 6 months, 25 days — YOUNGEST F1 championship leader ever.

Beats Hamilton's record of 22 years, 5 months, 6 days (2007).

First teenager EVER to lead the F1 championship. 🤯

#F1Fanrecap #Antonelli #F1History

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Antonelli: 3 races. 2 wins. 1 history book. 📖

He has pole in both of his race victories — China and Japan.

Leads Russell by 9 points. Mercedes leads Ferrari by 45 in constructors'.

The 2026 F1 season has its first teenage championship leader. 🔥

#F1Fanrecap #F1 #Antonelli

article.headline: History Made: Antonelli Becomes Youngest F1 Championship Leader Ever at 19

stories.title: Verstappen/Red Bull Crisis Deepens — Eliminated Q2, "Undriveable"
stories.angle: Verstappen eliminated in Q2 while teammate Hadjar reaches Q3; RB22 reportedly 10kg overweight

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Verstappen's 2026 so far: 👇

❌ Out in Q2 at Suzuka
❌ Calls car "undriveable"
❌ Rookie Hadjar outqualified him (P8 vs P11)
❌ 8 pts in P8 after 3 races
❌ Car 10kg overweight

"Months" to close the gap. This is a crisis. 😬

#F1Fanrecap #RedBull #F1

article.headline: Verstappen Calls RB22 "Undriveable" After Suzuka — Rookie Hadjar Outqualifies Him

stories.title: Piastri P2 on First Race Start — McLaren Fights Back
stories.angle: Piastri returns after missing Australia + China (double DNS), finishes P2 at Suzuka

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Piastri missed the first 2 races of 2026.

Formation lap crash in Australia. Electrical failure in China.

He showed up at Suzuka, qualified P3, finished P2. 🏎️

McLaren: 0 points to podium in one race.

Welcome back. 🏆

#F1Fanrecap #McLaren #JapaneseGP

article.headline: Piastri Skips Two Races, Then Finishes P2 at Suzuka: McLaren's Comeback Driver

stories.title: Championship Standings After Japan — Antonelli 72, Russell 63
stories.angle: Full standings update; Mercedes runaway lead, Verstappen 8th on 8 points

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
F1 standings after Round 3 🏆

DRIVERS:
No. 1 Antonelli — 72
No. 2 Russell — 63
No. 3 Leclerc — 34
No. 4 Hamilton — 33

CONSTRUCTORS:
No. 1 Mercedes — 135
No. 2 Ferrari — 90
No. 3 McLaren — 56
No. 4 Red Bull — 16

Verstappen: P8, 8 pts. 😳

#F1Fanrecap #F1 #Standings

stories.title: Hamilton at Suzuka — Five-Time Suzuka Winner, Ferrari Resurgence
stories.angle: Hamilton's Japan record + SF-26 development contribution story

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
Hamilton has won the Japanese GP 5 times. 🏆

Sunday: first time at Suzuka in Ferrari red, after 19 visits with McLaren and Mercedes.

"This car has my DNA in it" — he worked the SF-26 simulator all winter.

The resurgence is real. 🔥

#F1Fanrecap #Hamilton #Ferrari

article.headline: Hamilton Races Suzuka in Ferrari Red: The Five-Time Winner at His Favorite Circuit

stories.title: 5-Week Break Begins — Miami GP May 3
stories.angle: Season goes on pause after Japan; Bahrain/Saudi cancelled (Iran war); next race Miami May 3

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
Japan was the last F1 race until May 3. 📅

Bahrain and Saudi Arabia were cancelled due to the conflict in the region.

Next stop: Miami GP — 5 weeks away.

Mercedes leads both championships. Red Bull needs a miracle.

See you in Miami. 🌴

#F1Fanrecap #MiamiGP #F1
